channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: OpenAI dévoile ses conclusions sur l’impact de l’IA sur l’emploi : combien de métiers risquent de disparaître en Europe ?
item.description: OpenAI publie une cartographie rassurante de l'impact de l'IA sur l'emploi en Europe : 14% de métiers à risque élevé d'automatisation. Le résultat est soigné. L'auteur du rapport, lui, est le principal vendeur des outils qui posent le problème.

item.title: Samsung Messages is shutting down in July: here are 5 things you need to do
item.description: If you're in the US, then Samsung Messages won't work for much longer, and its days could be numbered elsewhere, too.

item.title: Ugreen's new Honkai: Star Rail collab is filled with cute accessories that are perfect for mobile gamers
item.description: Ugreen has just launched a new collection of Honkai: Star Rail mobile accessories.

item.title: I just reserved my WhatsApp username — here are 5 important things you need to know about the process
item.description: Reservations are already opening up for WhatsApp usernames, and here's what you need to bear in mind.

item.title: ‘Dolby Atmos in cars is not new anymore. It’s not outstanding’: Loewe is launching in-car audio from the team behind Mercedes’ iconic Burmester sound systems — and says it’s working with a ‘German’ car firm already
item.description: German AV maker Loewe's new integration audio team is working on bring premium audio design to cars, apartments, yachts, RVs…

item.title: The original Christopher Lee Dracula is coming to 4K Blu-ray in a new 'painstakingly restored' version with 'long-lost' footage 'sourced from around the world' that was never seen in the UK or US
item.description: Hammer Films has restored the original Dracula in 4K, including footage the censors tried to bury

item.title: Some businesses expect to hire more workers thanks to AI, not sack them
item.description: Box study finds companies now believe AI will create new roles, including AI agent operators, automation specialists and security professionals.

item.title: The 2 Best Slushie Machines of 2026: Now With Soft Serve
item.description: The original Ninja Slushi has been replaced! The new best slushie machines chill faster and make soft serve.

item.title: The Lenovo Slim 7i Aura Edition laptop is down to best-ever price at Amazon — last chance to save over $150
item.description: As of June 30, the Lenovo Slim 7i Aura Edition laptop (Core Ultra 7 Processor 256V, 16GB Memory, 1TB Storage) is back to its lowest-ever price at Amazon of $999.99. This is 13% off its typical price of $1,155.64.

item.title: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced is getting a proper PS5 Pro upgrade — and every graphics mode benefits
item.description: Ubisoft has unveiled the PlayStation features for Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, which is set to have three graphics modes across PS5andPS5 Pro.

item.title: I visited elite head-fi brand Audeze and found out exactly why planar magnetic headphones are better for gaming audio than regular dynamic drivers
item.description: I visited premium headphone brand Audeze to find out exactly why planar-magnetic drivers are perfect for gaming.

item.title: Fiat lance deux Topolino spéciales pour l’été : Sport et Vilebrequin à toit ouvrant
item.description: Le petit quadricycle électrique de Fiat s'habille pour la saison chaude avec deux nouvelles séries limitées aux partis pris stylistiques assumés. L'une joue la carte sportive et colorée, l'autre renouvelle un partenariat avec la marque de maillots de bain Vilebrequin.

item.title: Chute du Bitcoin : la crypto vient de vivre son pire mois en 4 ans
item.description: Le Bitcoin s'enfonce sous les 60 000 dollars, en baisse de plus de 50% par rapport à son record historique. La crypto vient de boucler son pire mois depuis quatre ans. Les investisseurs institutionnels désertent le marché, détournés par l'essor de l'IA.

item.title: The 27-inch LG UltraGear gaming monitor gets a $300 price cut at Amazon — buy now for under $700
item.description: Save $300 on the LG 27-inch UltraGear OLED gaming monitor (27GX790B-B) at Amazon, now on sale for $699.99 with a huge 30% price cut.

item.title: L’iPhone 16e devient enfin attractif grâce à une remise de 30 % sur la version 512 Go pendant les soldes
item.description: Il a fallu une réduction de 265 euros pour gommer les défauts de l'iPhone 16e et faire ressortir ses qualités comme la puce A18 ou sa confortable autonomie.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Marvel Super Heroes Play Booster Box hits record-low price at Amazon — over $80 off
item.description: Amazon has the MTG Marvel Super Heroes Play Booster Box for $125.95, saving you $83.75 on 30-packs — equal to $4.20 each.

item.title: Lenovo's ThinkPad T16 is 'a phenomenal laptop for productivity' — and this Gen 5 deal is exactly the kind of serious business laptop I’d recommend to anyone who needs a reliable daily driver
item.description: Speedy specs and the best keyboard on any laptop are precisely why this Windows 11 Pro laptop stands out for business professionals.

item.title: Slurpee Day is coming soon — how to grab a free drink (plus more treats) on July 11
item.description: Slurpee Day is back this summer, landing on Saturday, July 11. Here's how you can score the free small Slurpee on this day.

item.title: Bitdefender VPN Review: Fast and Affordable Privacy
item.description: Bitdefender VPN has an excellent starting price, even if it lacks the advanced features that privacy nerds may want.

item.title: Kidz Bop built a 3,000-song empire that has quietly outsold legends. He’s helped shape every track
item.description: Michael Anderson, the company’s senior VP of music, reflects on 25 years of turning chart-toppers into kid-friendly hits. There are unlikely cultural institutions, and then there’s Kidz Bop. Over the course of 25 years, what was initially supposed to be a one-off music compilation of kid-friendly cover songs has spawned 52 follow-ups, helped launch careers, and even become a benchmark by which pop artists measure success—one rewritten lyric at a time....

item.title: Samsung reveals the Galaxy Ring 2 is in the pipeline, and it’s tipped to do things its predecessor hasn’t done before — here are 5 ways it could seriously compete with the Oura Ring 5
item.description: SVP at Samsung says the Galaxy Ring 2 is on the way, and it's already looking to storm the fitness trackers competition.

item.title: Comment faire une majuscule avec accent É, È, Ù, À, Ç sur Windows 11 ?
item.description: Les claviers AZERTY ne permettent pas, par défaut, de taper certains caractères très utiles dans la langue française comme les guillemets ou les majuscules accentuées. Vous cherchez à écrire un Ù majuscule, un É, un È, un À ou un Ç en majuscule ? Voici comment écrire facilement ces lettres majuscules avec accent sur un clavier AZERTY sous Windows 11. ...

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic just hit its lowest price since launch — save over $100 at Amazon
item.description: Save 33% on the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic (2025) at Amazon. The 46mm Bluetooth smartwatch drops to $334.99 from $499.99, cutting $165 off a model with rotating bezel control.

item.title: Celebrate Pokémon turning 30 with this epic Pokémon G-SHOCK collab — how to pre-order
item.description: The new Pokémon G-SHOCK watch launches on July 1 for $270. Here's how to pre-order.

item.title: My favorite quirky hi-res audio firm just released ultra-cheap over-ear headphones, and I cannot understand how FiiO kept the price so low
item.description: $49 wireless headphones with LDAC, 75-hour stamina and ANC? OK but they’re made by Temu, right? Try head-fi specialist FiiO (and yes, I’m shocked too)

item.title: « 45 °C le 6 juillet, pire que juin » : comment vérifier les vrais modèles météo sur votre smartphone
item.description: Une capture d'écran annonce 45 °C pour le 6 juillet, et tout le monde la partage. Avant de paniquer, autant apprendre à vérifier soi-même ce que disent vraiment les modèles météo.

item.title: Renault remplace Google Assistant par Gemini : voici ce que ça change à bord
item.description: Renault remplace Google Assistant par Gemini sur ses véhicules équipés du système openR link. La mise à jour est gratuite et s’effectuera automatiquement à distance. Commandes en langage naturel, établissement d’itinéraires, contrôle du véhicule : voici tout ce qui change.

item.title: This year's 'Back to School' laptop deals are already live — here are 9 options from Dell, Lenovo, and HP that can save you up to $530
item.description: Heading to College? These are the 9 best laptop deals from this week's sales, including options for all budgets.

item.title: This motor could be the future of e-bikes
item.description: Imagine an e-bike motor that lets you select your preferred pedaling cadence and then automatically adjusts the gears to keep your legs spinning at that exact speed, no matter how steep the hill gets - all without a fragile derailleur or heavy multi-speed cassette to maintain. Prefer manual control? No problem, you can have as […]

item.title: Bernie Sanders Saw This Coming
item.description: For decades, the senator has argued that concentrated wealth threatened American democracy. Now he’s betting that frustration with Big Tech, billionaires, and unchecked AI is reaching a tipping point.

item.title: 'Such a weird choice': DC comic book fans react to new report that appears to reveal which DCU movie will be made after James Gunn's Superman sequel — and it won't star Batman or Wonder Woman
item.description: As DC Studios reels over Supergirl's disastrous launch, fans question why another Batman villain movie is reportedly in the works.

item.title: ‘60FPS feels like a bridge too far’: GTA 6 is likely to only run at 30fps on PS5 consoles due to CPU limitations, tech analysts say — but there’s hope that ‘a 40fps mode would be a good option if 60 is off the table’
item.description: Grand Theft Auto 6 may not support 60FPS on current-gen consoles, including PlayStation 5 Pro, at launch, meaning 30FPS will be the baseline.

item.title: Amixem démonte une pub Xiaomi… mais se trompe complètement de smartphone
item.description: Dans une vidéo, Amixem reproduit une publicité Xiaomi en se suspendant à un smartphone de la marque. Problème, il s'est trompé de modèle.

item.title: Votre Steam Controller peut aller se recharger toute seule grâce à un mod
item.description: Une application sur le web permet de détourner les moteurs de la manette Steam pour l’aider à se déplacer jusqu’à son point de recharge.

item.title: Prix cassé pour la Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 avec 45 % de remise pendant les soldes d’été
item.description: E.Leclerc profite de l'existence de la Watch 8 et des soldes d'été pour casser le prix de la Samsung Galaxy Watch 7. Actuellement, elle est affichée à 189 euros, soit une remise de 45 %.
